case_title: FRANIA FELDSTEIN VS. THOMAS KARABIN ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-10-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-10-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. THE PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. THE DEFENDANTS WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANT'S WITNESS WAYNE TRAN SWORN AND EXAMINED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE DONALD MITCHELL, CLERK KEVIN LEE, NOT REPORTED, D506
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,215.00 FILED BY FELDSTEIN, FRANIA AS TO DEFENDANT KARABIN, THOMAS DBA TRIMMERS TRAN, KIM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-10-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE;$0.00 SERVED FEB-03-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT KARABIN, THOMAS DBA TRIMMERS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SEERVICE;$0.00 SERVED FEB-02-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TRAN, KIM
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-10-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FELDSTEIN, FRANIA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT KARABIN, THOMAS DBA TRIMMERS TRAN, KIM PURSUANT TO CCP 116.610 - THE PREVAILING PARTY IS ENTITLED TO THE COSTS OF THE ACTION, INCLUDING THE COSTS OF SERVING THE ORDER FOR THE APPEARANCE OF THE DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
